prompt: Show the grade distribution for each department

inputData.question: Show the grade distribution for each department

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the grade distribution for each department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the grade distribution for each department"},"startedAt":1771803451331,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Aggregate grades by joining departments -> courses -> course_sections -> enrollments -> grades, group by department and grade_value, and compute per-department percentage. I exclude NULL grade_value entries (assumed not meaningful) so only observed grade categories are shown.","sql":"WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.grade_value::text AS grade_value,
    COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name, g.grade_value::text
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  grade_value,
  grade_count,
  ROUND((grade_count::numeric / SUM(grade_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id)) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_department
FROM dept_grades
ORDER BY department_name, grade_value NULLS LAST;","assumptions":["grade_value is a categorical value (e.g., letter grades) and can be cast to text","Show only departments/grade categories with at least one recorded (non-NULL) grade_value; departments with no grades will not appear in the result","join path uses foreign keys: courses.department_id -> departments.id, course_sections.course_id -> courses.id, enrollments.course_section_id -> course_sections.id, grades.enrollment_id -> enrollments.id"]},"endedAt":1771803497037},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.grade_value::text AS grade_value,
    COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name, g.grade_value::text
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  grade_value,
  grade_count,
  ROUND((grade_count::numeric / SUM(grade_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id)) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_department
FROM dept_grades
ORDER BY department_name, grade_value NULLS LAST;"},"startedAt":1771803497040,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.grade_value::text AS grade_value,
    COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name, g.grade_value::text
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  grade_value,
  grade_count,
  ROUND((grade_count::numeric / SUM(grade_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id)) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_department
FROM dept_grades
ORDER BY department_name, grade_value NULLS data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.grade_value::text AS grade_value,
    COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name, g.grade_value::text
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  grade_value,
  grade_count,
  ROUND((grade_count::numeric / SUM(grade_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id)) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_department
FROM dept_grades
ORDER BY department_name, grade_value NULLS LAST;

result.sql:
WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.grade_value::text AS grade_value,
    COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name, g.grade_value::text
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_name,
  grade_value,
  grade_count,
  ROUND((grade_count::numeric / SUM(grade_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id)) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_department
FROM dept_grades
ORDER BY department_name, grade_value NULLS LAST;
